General.Name: Compagnie du Cambodge
General.Description: Compagnie du Cambodge, together with its subsidiaries, provides transportation and logistics services in France. It operates pedestrian access systems for controlling passenger flow in stations and airports. The company was incorporated in 1955 and is headquartered in Puteaux, France. Compagnie du Cambodge is a subsidiary of Plantations des Terres Rouges SA.

1.Name: Mr. Cédric  de Bailliencourt
1.Title: CFO & Vice Chairman of the Supervisory Board

2.Name: Mr. Emmanuel  Fossorier
2.Title: Director of Financial Communication & Member of the Management Board
